ownership_contract.task_goal: PR Ready implementation for Lode FR #199 BOSS Zhipin real read-only capability packages.
ownership_contract.read_scope: Lode repository, GitHub issue/PR metadata, and read-only research/source locators outside Lode.
ownership_contract.write_ownership: Lode BOSS package assets, registry files, contract docs, and LODE-209 Loom carriers only.
non_goals: No merge or issue closeout by this execution subagent
ownership_contract.output_format: Implementation PR with metadata covering #199 #209 #210 #211 #212 and final subagent report to the main controller.

ownership_constraints: Write ownership is limited to Lode package assets, registry fixtures, contract docs, and LODE-209 Loom carriers.
Forbidden writes include App, Harbor, WebEnvoy/Core, research, and sources paths.
No live BOSS login automation, external-visible recruitment actions, batch automation, CAPTCHA/safety bypass, merge, or issue closeout actions in the execution subagent.
integration_evidence: Added BOSS job-search and read-job-detail package assets using existing validator-supported package roles.
Added resource requirements, login/page readiness, securityId handoff, post-check, failure mapping, redacted fixtures, registry entries, query fixture, and package contract documentation.
Local package validators, registry validation, py_compile, diff check, Loom verify, fact-chain, suite validate, suite evidence validate, and suite carrier validate were run for PR Ready.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: This PR adds repo-local Lode package assets, registry fixtures, and docs only; it does not add runtime code, cross-repo API ownership, live evidence storage, or executable browser automation.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Validator, registry, Core/App package discovery, resource requirement declaration, fixture shape, post-check fixture output, and failure vocabulary.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to full suite when a later PR adds live runtime execution, Core result envelopes, Harbor evidence schemas, write/precheck behavior, hosted registry behavior, or cross-repo contract ownership changes.
